message:
fix: align checkDiskSpace signature across platforms

The non-Unix stub in generator_other.go was returning only 1 value
while the Unix implementation returns (*Alert, error). This caused
a compile error in cross-platform CI checks.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
